programme.title: BKFC 54
programme.desc: Rosen Dimitrov vs. Todor Zhelyazkov, middleweight; Georgi Valentinov vs. Bojan Kosendar, middleweight. From Arena Sofia in Sofia, Bulgaria. From Nov. 17, 2023.

programme.title: The Bare Knuckle Show
programme.desc: Host Brian Soscia discusses combat sporting news, exclusive BKFC content, interviews & more from the past month.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: BELLATOR MMA champ Patricio Pitbull takes on Emmanuel Sanchez.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: The Bellator MMA light heavyweight world grand prix kicks off when heavyweight champ Ryan Bader (27-6) meets Lyoto Machida (26-10) in a rematch. Plus, former world title challenger Liz Carmouche (14-7) faces Vanessa Porto (22-8) in a flyweight bout.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: Eric Persson, Jean-Robert Bellande, Patrick Antonius, Sean Perry, Lynne Ji, Maria Ho, Eli Elezra, Jimmy D'Ambrosio, Dylan DeStefano, Nick Schulman, Krish Menon, David Williams, Alan Keating and Boston Rob Mariano play a variety of stakes.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: Eric Persson, Jean-Robert Bellande, Patrick Antonius, Sean Perry, Lynne Ji, Maria Ho, Eli Elezra, Jimmy D'Ambrosio, Dylan DeStefano, Nick Schulman, Krish Menon, David Williams, Alan Keating and Boston Rob Mariano play a variety of stakes.

programme.title: Coach and Company
programme.desc: Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders.

programme.title: Coach and Bro
programme.desc: Join Coach and Vince Russo for unfiltered analysis and insider takes on the latest in professional wrestling. The Coach and Bro Show delivers no-nonsense commentary, shocking revelations, and lively discussions every week, tune in for expert perspectives and entertainment from two industry veterans.

programme.desc: From Alfredo Harp Helu Stadium in Iztacalco, Mexico City, Mexico.

programme.title: Bellator vs. Rizin 2
programme.desc: From July 29, 2023. Featuring Patricio Pitbull vs. Roberto de Souza, plus Kyoji Horgiuchi vs. Makoto Shinryu for the vacant Bellator Flyweight Championship.

programme.desc: BELLATOR champ Vadim Nemkov, Phil Davis, Corey Anderson in action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Juan "The Spaniard" Archuleta (25-2) makes the first defense of his Bellator MMA Bantamweight World Championship against Sergio "S.P." Pettis (20-5) in a five-round main event. From May 7, 2021 at Mohegan Sun Casino, Uncasville, Conn.

programme.desc: Warriors Cup is the sole US partner of ONE Championship, featuring top Muay Thai athletes from across America and around the world!

programme.desc: Features Luis Palomino vs. Tom Shoaff for BKFC lightweight title, and David Mundell vs. Francesco Ricci for vacant BKFC middleweight title from Hollywood, Florida. From Dec. 3, 2022.

programme.desc: Features Gorjan Slaveski vs. Yosdenis Cedeno, and Keith Richardson vs. Justin Scoggins in bare knuckle boxing action from Myrtle Beach, S.C. From Jan. 27, 2023.

programme.desc: Chef Khanh Ong travels to Cairns Australia to embark on an adventure to the rainforests of Mission Beach.

programme.desc: The snowpark in Val Thorens has dozens of jumps and pipes, which call for many accidents and rescues!

programme.title: No Days Off
programme.desc: Sasha travels to the remote island of Makatea in French Polynesia to learn about the island's unique history.

programme.desc: Biju Thomas visits Heber Valley, Utah, to try some local cuisine.

programme.title: The Road Less Eaten with Biju Thomas

programme.desc: Dr. Paul Piff begins research at Lake Tahoe to discover what connects us in an era of loneliness and division.

programme.title: Beyond Awestruck
programme.desc: The UCI team at the Tahoe Lab measures how awe impacts happiness, gratitude, relationships, and well-being.

programme.title: Failure is an Option
programme.sub-title: I Made a Houseboat Out of Basic Car Camping Gear
programme.desc: It turns out it’s way easier and cheaper to build your own floating home than I ever imagined.

programme.title: Failure is an Option
programme.sub-title: Self Hiking Boots and Lift Chair
programme.desc: In this episode, I set out to fix a missing element for a walk in the woods' self-hiking boots.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: From riding bulls in Fort Worth to off-roading in the Chihuahuan desert we forge our path across Texas.

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.desc: Epic weekend adventures designed to push the boundaries of what's possible.

programme.desc: Mike and Jason head out on a hiking and pack rafting mission of the Sawtooth Range in central Idaho.

programme.desc: Mike and Jason head to Maui for a Sea to Sky to Sea multisport mission.

programme.desc: The team races to find two overdue snowmobilers in the remote backcountry in harsh, low-visibility conditions.
